Title: User navigates to Settings from Homepage
Preconditions: User is on the Homepage.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on "Impostazioni".
2. Verify that the "Impostazioni" page opens.
Expected Result: The "Impostazioni" page should open successfully.

Title: User views a new location from Homepage
Preconditions: User is on the Homepage.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on "Visualizzazione nuovo luogo".
2. Verify that the "Pathfinder" page opens.
Expected Result: The "Pathfinder" page should open successfully.

Title: User navigates to Pathfinder from Visualizzazione nuovo luogo
Preconditions: User is on the "Visualizzazione nuovo luogo" page.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on "Pathfinder".
2. Verify that the "Pathfinder" page opens.
Expected Result: The "Pathfinder" page should open successfully.

Title: User swipes to the right from Visualizzazione nuovo luogo
Preconditions: User is on the "Visualizzazione nuovo luogo" page.
Test Steps:
1. Swipe to the right.
2. Verify that the application does not perform any action.
Expected Result: No action should occur upon swiping to the right.

Title: User navigates to Mappa from Pagina dettagliata
Preconditions: User is on the "Pagina dettagliata" page.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on "Navigate".
2. Verify that the "Mappa" page opens.
Expected Result: The "Mappa" page should open successfully.

Title: User navigates to Yelp from Pagina dettagliata
Preconditions: User is on the "Pagina dettagliata" page.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on "Open in Browser".
2. Verify that the Yelp website opens in the browser.
Expected Result: The Yelp website should open in the browser.

Title: User initiates a call from Pagina dettagliata
Preconditions: User is on the "Pagina dettagliata" page.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on "Call Business".
2. Verify that the phone app initiates a call to the business.
Expected Result: The phone app should initiate a call to the business.

Title: User returns to Homepage from Pagina dettagliata
Preconditions: User is on the "Pagina dettagliata" page.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on "Indietro".
2. Verify that the user returns to the "Pagina dettagliata" page.
Expected Result: The user should return to the "Pagina dettagliata" page.

Title: User navigates back to Homepage from Pathfinder
Preconditions: User is on the "Apertura pagina Pathfinder" page.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on "Indietro".
2. Verify that the user returns to the "Apertura pagina Pathfinder" page.
Expected Result: The user should return to the "Apertura pagina Pathfinder" page.

Title: User navigates to question from Pathfinder
Preconditions: User is on the "Apertura pagina Pathfinder" page.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on "Indietro" (not clicked).
2. Verify that the question is displayed.
Expected Result: The question should be displayed.

Title: User navigates to suggested location from question
Preconditions: User is on the "Apertura pagina Pathfinder" page and a suggestion is available.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on "Indietro" (not clicked).
2. Verify that the suggested location is displayed.
3. Tap on "Ritorno ad Homepage".
4. Verify that the user returns to the "Apertura pagina Pathfinder" page.
Expected Result: The suggested location should be displayed, and the user should return to the "Apertura pagina Pathfinder" page.

Title: User navigates to homepage without suggestion from question
Preconditions: User is on the "Apertura pagina Pathfinder" page and no suggestion is available.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on "Indietro" (not clicked).
2. Verify that the question is displayed.
3. Tap on "Ritorno ad Homepage".
4. Verify that the user returns to the "Apertura pagina Pathfinder" page.
Expected Result: The question should be displayed, and the user should return to the "Apertura pagina Pathfinder" page.
